title: Kitchen 29cm Mesh Splatter Guard Screen Cover Oil Spit Frying Pan Lid Handle
features: Made with a fine mesh that will stop food, oil, soup etc spitting out of the pan.
Can also be used to cover and protect fresh food from files/insects.
Easy to clean and dishwasher safe.
